==== /.src/floatingEffect_subtypes.ts (5 flows) ====

=== Piping Flow ===
Location: 5:28 - 14:3
Node: Effect.gen(function*() {\n  // Fiber type: forkDetach returns a Fiber, should NOT trigger\n  yield* Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.forkDetach)\n\n  // Exit type: Effect.exit returns an Exit, should NOT trigger\n  yield* Effect.exit(Effect.void)\n\n  // Pool: subtype of Effect, should NOT trigger\n  yield* Pool.make({ acquire: Effect.succeed(1), size: 10 })\n})
Node Kind: KindCallExpression

Subject: function*() {\n  // Fiber type: forkDetach returns a Fiber, should NOT trigger\n  yield* Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.forkDetach)\n\n  // Exit type: Effect.exit returns an Exit, should NOT trigger\n  yield* Effect.exit(Effect.void)\n\n  // Pool: subtype of Effect, should NOT trigger\n  yield* Pool.make({ acquire: Effect.succeed(1), size: 10 })\n}
Subject Type: () => Generator<Effect<Fiber<number, never>, never, never> | Effect<Pool<number, never>, never, Scope> | Effect<Exit<void, never>, never, never>, void, any>

  [0] kind: call
      callee: Effect.gen
      args: (constant)
      outType: Effect<void, never, Scope>
